# Test Fixtures

This directory contains deterministic `.blend` files generated by
`build_sample_scenes.py`. Do not store API keys, private project files, or production scenes here.

- `simple_scene.blend`: one selected mesh plus a material, light, and camera.
- `messy_scene.blend`: nested collections, shared mesh data, unusual transforms, hidden objects,
  and synthetic path-like custom properties used to verify privacy filtering.
- `large_scene.blend`: 1,000 lightweight objects used to measure context budgets and collection time.

Regenerate all fixtures with Blender 5.1:

```powershell
& 'C:\Program Files\Blender Foundation\Blender 5.1\blender.exe' --background --factory-startup --python-exit-code 1 --python tests/fixtures/build_sample_scenes.py
```

The path-like values are fake test strings. Generated fixtures must remain small, deterministic, and
free of real project data.
